memoryArtifacts.headline: Henry de Cobham Bio (According to Wiki)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Henry de Cobham, 1st Baron Cobham (of Kent) (c. 1260 – 25 August 1339)[1] was an English Peer.

Family

zh.Stoke sub Hamdon, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特斯托克 素布 哈姆頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Cobham於大約1260年出生在英國肯特可巴姆時，他的父親John de Cobham32歲，母親Joan Septvans20歲。他於1285年7月之前與Maud Moreville結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1339年8月25日在英國薩默塞特享年80歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特斯托克 素布 哈姆頓。

zh-hans.Stoke sub Hamdon, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特斯托克 素布 哈姆頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Cobham于大约1260年出生在英国肯特可巴姆时，他的父亲John de Cobham32岁，母亲Joan Septvans20岁。他于1285年7月之前与Maud Moreville结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1339年8月25日在英国薩默塞特享年80岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特斯托克 素布 哈姆頓。

nameMeanings.name: Cobham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of at least three places in southern England called Cobham, in Kent, Surrey, and Sussex.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Cobham was born about 1260, in Cobham, Kent, England, his father, John de Cobham, was 32 and his mother, Joan Septvans, was 20. He married Maud Moreville before July 1285. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 25 August 1339, in Somerset, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Stoke sub Hamdon, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Cobham est né environ 1260, à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John de Cobham, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan Septvans, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Maud Moreville avant juillet 1285. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 août 1339, à Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Stoke sub Hamdon, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Cobham um 1260 in Cobham, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Cobham 32 und seine Mutter Joan Septvans 20. Er hat vor Juli 1285 Maud Moreville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. August 1339 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Somerset, England und wurde in Stoke sub Hamdon, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Cobham è nato il circa 1260 nel Cobham, Kent, England, il suo padre, John de Cobham, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Joan Septvans, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Maud Moreville prima del luglio 1285. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 agosto 1339, nel Somerset, England, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Stoke sub Hamdon, Somerset, England.

ja.Stoke sub Hamdon, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトストク スブ ハムドン
ja.Shorne, Kent, England: イギリスケントショルン
ja.Cobham, Kent, England: イギリスケントコブハム
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Cobhamが約1260年にイギリスケントコブハムで生まれた時，父John de Cobhamは32歳，母Joan Septvansは20歳であった。1285年7月以前にMaud Morevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1339年8月25日にイギリスソメルセトで80歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトストク スブ ハムドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Cobham(이)가 대략 1260년 영국 켄트 컵함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Cobham(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Septvans(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1285년 7월 이전 Maud Moreville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1339년 8월 25일 영국 서머세트에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 스토크 수브 함던에 묻혔다.

mn.Stoke sub Hamdon, Somerset, England: Stoke sub Hamdon, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Cobham nasceu aproximadamente 1260, em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Cobham, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joan Septvans, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Moreville antes julho de 1285. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de agosto de 1339, em Somerset, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Stoke sub Hamdon, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Cobham родился около 1260 г. в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Cobham было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Septvans, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Moreville перед июля 1285 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 августа 1339 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности сток суб хамдон, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry Cobham nació aproximadamente 1260, en Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Cobham, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Joan Septvans, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Maud Moreville antes de julio de 1285. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de agosto de 1339, en Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Stoke sub Hamdon, Somerset, Inglaterra.
